SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AccountFragment
A fragment that allows the user to view and manage their account information.
AccountFragmentTest
Unit tests for user information management and updates.
AccountFragmentVisualTest
Instrumented test to verify that the AccountFragment correctly displays user information from the UserManager.
CancelledFragment
A fragment that displays the list of events that have been cancelled for the user.
CreateEventFragment
A fragment that allows users to create a new event.
DeleteEventDialogFragment
A dialog fragment that prompts the user to confirm the deletion of an event.
DeleteEventDialogFragment.OnFragmentInteractionListener
Interface for receiving deletion confirmation events.
EditEventFragment
A fragment that allows an organizer to edit the details of an existing event.
EnrolledEntrant
Represents a user who has successfully enrolled in an event.
EnrolledEntrantAdapter
RecyclerView adapter used to display enrolled entrants The adapter binds EnrolledEntrant objects to the enrolled_entrant.xml Displays: participant name, participant email, enrollment status Used by EnrolledFragment to render the list of confirmed participants
EnrolledEntrantsTest
 
EnrolledFragment
Fragment that displays the final list of entrants enrolled in an event.
Entrant
Represents an applicant/entrant for an event waitlist.
Entrant.Status
Enumeration of possible statuses for an entrant.
EntrantAdapter
Adapter class for a RecyclerView that displays a list of Entrant objects.
Event
Represents an event in the EventsApp system.
EventArrayAdapter
A custom ArrayAdapter for displaying a list of Event objects in a ListView.
EventDetailFragment
A fragment that displays the full details of a specific event.
EventDialogFragment
A dialog fragment for adding or editing basic event details (name and capacity).
EventsFragment
A fragment that displays a list of events associated with the current user.
ExampleInstrumentedTest
Instrumented test, which will execute on an Android device.
ExampleUnitTest
Example local unit test, which will execute on the development machine (host).
ExploreFragment
A fragment that allows users to explore and search for all available events.
InboxFragment
A fragment that displays the user's notification inbox.
InboxIntentTest
 
InvitationResponseController
Controller class responsible for handling user responses to event invitations.
InvitationResponseControllerTest
 
LotteryNotificationController
Controller class responsible for managing notifications related to the event lottery process.
LotteryNotificationControllerTest
 
MainActivity
 
NotificationItem
Represents a notification sent to a user in the event application.
OrganizerEntrantAdapter
Adapter class for managing and displaying the list of entrants in the organizer's waitlist view.
OrganizerEntrantAdapter.OnEntrantActionListener
Interface definition for callbacks to be invoked when an action is taken on an entrant.
OrganizerWaitlistFragment
A Fragment representing the organizer's view of an event's waitlist.
OrgNotificationsTest
Unit tests for NotificationItem objects used in organizer notifications.
QRCodeUtil
Utility class for generating QR codes.
RegistrationTest
 
SignInFragment
A fragment that handles user authentication, including sign-in and sign-up.
UserManager
Singleton manager class for handling the current user session and authentication state.
UserNotification
Represents a notification intended for a user within the application's UI.
UserNotification.Type
Enumeration of notification types.
Users
Represents a user in the EventsApp system.
UserSession
Utility class for managing a global user session, often used for prototyping or maintaining a demo user state within the application.
UsersTest
 
ViewEntrantsFragment
US 02.06.01: View list of all chosen entrants who are invited to apply.
WaitlistFragment
A fragment that manages the waitlist for a specific event.
